nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill guide for packaging Python applications into commercial-grade Windows installers using Nuitka compilation and Inno Setup, including a 37-section bilingual (English/Chinese) reference covering size optimization, VC++ runtime handling, and production workflows derived from a real 323 MB PySide2 application.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill reference for Git workflow patterns covering branching strategies (GitHub Flow, trunk-based, GitFlow), conventional commits, merge vs rebase, PR workflow, conflict resolution, branch management, release management, and git hooks with a quick-reference section.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for GitHub repository operations including issue triage workflows, PR management, stale policies, CI/CD operations, release management, and security monitoring using the GitHub CLI and API.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: In-depth skill reference for idiomatic Go development patterns covering core principles, error handling, concurrency (worker pools, context, errgroup, graceful shutdown), interface design, package organization, struct design with functional options, and memory/performance optimization.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill guide for Go testing patterns including TDD workflow, table-driven tests, subtests, benchmarks, fuzzing (Go 1.18+), HTTP handler testing, test helpers with golden files, interface-based mocking, coverage tooling, and CI/CD integration.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Concise skill guide for operating on Google Workspace assets (Docs, Sheets, Drive) with a preferred tool surface, inspect-before-edit workflow, and precision editing guidelines.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for building Clinical Decision Support System (CDSS) features with patterns for drug interaction checking, dose validation, NEWS2 clinical scoring, alert severity, and zero-tolerance patient safety testing requirements.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill reference for EMR (Electronic Medical Records) development covering patient safety-first patterns, single-page encounter flows, smart template systems, medication safety, locked encounter patterns, and clinical UI/accessibility requirements.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for a patient-safety verification eval harness with categorized evaluation gates (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM), pass/fail matrices, and CI/CD integration to block deployments when patient-safety assertions fail.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for HIPAA PHI/PII compliance patterns including data classification, row-level security access control, audit trails, common leak vectors, database schema tagging, and deployment checklists to protect protected health information.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for importing external tasks and jobs into the Hermes task system with import rules, sanitization checklists, conversion patterns, and an output contract defining the accepted job format.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill guide for hexagonal (ports and adapters) architecture with a 6-step workflow, architecture diagram, multi-language mapping, TypeScript examples, migration playbook, and testing guidance organized around inbound/outbound port boundaries.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Concise skill guide for HIPAA compliance decisions covering PHI data handling, vendor/tooling evaluation under HIPAA constraints, specific guardrails, and cross-references to related healthcare compliance skills.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Pre-flight skill guide for assessing homelab network readiness before upgrades, covering inventory requirements, VLAN and trust-zone planning, DNS filtering readiness, remote access prerequisites, safe change sequences, and anti-patterns.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for setting up a homelab network from scratch with IP planning, DHCP and DNS configuration, cabling and Wi-Fi setup, and example configurations for beginner and VLAN-ready deployments.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for deploying Pi-hole as a network-wide DNS ad blocker in a homelab, covering Docker and bare-metal installation, network DNS routing, blocklist management, DNS-over-HTTPS upstreams, local DNS records, and troubleshooting.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Detailed skill guide for VLAN-based network segmentation in homelab environments with design templates, configuration examples for UniFi, pfSense/OPNsense, and MikroTik hardware, firewall rules, trunk vs access port setup, and best practices.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill guide for setting up WireGuard VPN in a homelab covering Linux server setup, client configuration, split vs full tunnel modes, key generation and peer management, pfSense/OPNsense integration, DDNS, and troubleshooting.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill reference for authoring Hookify rule files with YAML frontmatter, explaining event types (bash, file, stop, prompt), regex pattern writing guidelines, testing procedures, file organization, and available commands.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for inheriting and mimicking the coding style of legacy codebases, using auto-detect modes, full-scan and incremental-sniff branches to build a style profile and enforce it on every turn.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill guide for intent-driven development (IDD) that structures requirements elicitation through goal/risk discovery, context exploration, scope definition, acceptance criteria writing, and handoff, with a full output template and pass/fail rubric.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for inventory demand planning covering forecasting methods, forecast accuracy metrics, safety stock calculation, reorder logic, ABC/XYZ classification, promotional planning, decision frameworks, escalation protocols, and KPIs for retail operations.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for creating investor materials (pitch decks, one-pagers, financial models, accelerator applications) with a founder-voice golden rule, core workflow, asset-specific guidance, red flags to avoid, and a quality gate checklist.

nodes.name: SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill guide for investor outreach covering cold email structure, voice handling, hard bans, personalization sources, follow-up cadence, warm intro requests, post-meeting updates, and a quality gate to prevent sycophantic or spammy messaging.

nodes.name: generate_icons.swift
nodes.summary: Swift CLI script that generates iOS/macOS icon image sets from SF Symbols, rendering each symbol at 1x/2x/3x scales with configurable color, size, and font weight, and writing the resulting PNG files plus Xcode asset catalog Contents.json to the specified output directory.
nodes.languageNotes: Written as a runnable Swift script (#!/usr/bin/env swift) using AppKit — requires macOS due to NSImage and NSColor dependencies. Uses a value-type IconSpec struct and an enum-based error hierarchy.

nodes.name: parseColor
nodes.summary: Parses a hex color string (with or without leading #) into an NSColor, returning a system gray fallback on invalid input.

nodes.name: parseWeight
nodes.summary: Maps a font weight name string to the corresponding NSFont.Weight enum value, defaulting to thin on unrecognized input.

nodes.name: generateIcon
nodes.summary: Core icon generation function that creates an Xcode imageset directory, renders an SF Symbol at 1x/2x/3x pixel sizes with the configured color and weight using NSImage, and writes PNG files plus Contents.json, throwing typed IconError values on failure.

nodes.name: requireOptionValue
nodes.summary: CLI argument helper that retrieves the value following a named flag from the arguments array, exiting with an error if missing or if the next argument looks like another flag.

nodes.name: IconSpec
nodes.summary: Value-type struct that holds the configuration for a single icon generation task: SF Symbol name, output asset name, base point size, color, and font weight.

nodes.name: IconError
nodes.summary: Typed error enum for icon generation failures covering directory creation, symbol lookup, configuration, PNG creation, and file-write error cases, with a CustomStringConvertible description.
